name: Beef Burgundy Stew/Crockpot or Microwave
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart casserole dish, cook the bacon in the microwave on high (100%) power for 2 to 2 minutes or until done. Remove and drain the bacon, reserving the drippings.
2. Crumble the cooled bacon and set aside.
3. Stir flour, bouillon granules, and basil into the reserved drippings.
4. Add beef, undrained tomatoes, and wine; mix well.
5. Cook covered on high (100%) power for 2 minutes.
6. Reduce power to medium-high (50%) and cook, stirring twice, for 15 minutes.
7. Stir in onions and mushrooms.
8. Continue cooking at medium-high (50%) power for 12 to 18 minutes or until the meat and vegetables are tender, stirring twice.
9. Sprinkle crumbled bacon on top and serve. This recipe can also be cooked in a crockpot by following similar steps with adjusted cooking times.
